title: Industrial IoT in Manufacturing
content: Smart factory systems leverage IoT sensors to capture real-time operational data, machine performance, and overall equipment effectiveness (OEE).

title: Predictive Maintenance Algorithms
content: Using machine learning and sensor telemetry to predict machine breakdowns before they cause unplanned downtime in assembly lines.

title: Natural Language Processing and RAG
content: Retrieval-Augmented Generation relies on dense vector search to retrieve relevant context chunks for Large Language Models.

title: Hybrid Search Architectures
content: Combining sparse BM25 term matching with dense embedding vector similarity using Reciprocal Rank Fusion provides superior search precision.
